title: xanthophytum glomeratum
intro: Xanthophytum glomeratum, also known as Java tea or yellow ginger, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Xanthophytum glomeratum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Xanthophytum glomeratum can be prepared as a tea or taken in capsule form, and it is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, to support skin health and wound healing.
